title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-02
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the greenhouse and updating community app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with metrics while Polly waters code-plants, representing the automated health checks of the app ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot waters glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on a digital greenhouse.
